CrearRutina.title: Create Your Ideal Routine

toasts.created: Your routine has been created successfully

EditarRutina.title: Edit Your Routine
EditarRutina.description: Update the general information and adjust the steps of your existing routine.
EditarRutina.notFoundDescription: We could not find a routine with the provided ID.

GuardarRutina.pageDescription: Review and adjust each step description in your routine. You can reorder, edit details, or remove steps before saving your personalized routine.

infoCard.title: Routine information
infoCard.productsSelected: {count, plural, =0 {0 selected products} =1 {1 selected product} other {{count} selected products}}

steps.title: Description of each step
steps.empty: There are no steps in the routine. Add products from the selector to get started.

errors.nameMin: Step name must have at least 2 characters
errors.descriptionMin: Step description must have at least 5 characters
errors.atLeastOneStep: You must add at least one step to the routine

validation.nameMin: Routine name must have at least 3 characters
validation.descriptionMin: Routine description must have at least 10 characters
validation.skinTypeRequired: You must select a skin type

toast.added: {name} has been added to your routine
toast.removed: {name} has been removed from your routine

Home.topProductsDescription: Selected by our community and dermatologists.

CommentHome.title: Explore real community routines
CommentHome.description: Discover routines shared by people with your same skin type, compare outcomes, and adapt your plan step by step.
CommentHome.feature3: Practical ideas to improve your daily routine
CommentHome.post1: What is the best sunscreen for oily skin that won't clog pores?
CommentHome.post2: My vitamin C transformation after 3 months (Results)
CommentHome.post3: Can retinol be used with niacinamide? Experts explain.
CommentHome.ctaDescription: Get weekly personalized skincare tips and early access to product launches.

SeccionInfoHome.description: Join a community of over 50k enthusiasts. Track your progress, find the perfect routine for your skin type and discover products that actually work.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Routine
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete

Login.subtitle: Sign in to your daily skincare ritual
Login.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Check your username/email and password.

Auth.requiredDescription: You need to sign in to create or edit routines and to interact with comments.

AiRoutine.title: Create a routine by chatting with AI
AiRoutine.description: Describe what you want to achieve, refine the draft in real time, and select products that already exist inside Skin4All.

suggestionsSheet.title: Suggestions
suggestionsSheet.description: Browse suggested products and shortcuts to keep refining the conversation.

mobileDraft.title: Routine draft
mobileDraft.description: Edit your routine without leaving the chat.

starterPrompts.title: Starting points
starterPrompts.description: Begin with a clear intention and keep iterating through the chat.

hydration.label: More hydration and barrier care
hydration.value: I want a routine focused on hydration, barrier repair, and less irritation.

breakouts.label: Breakouts and texture
breakouts.value: I need a routine that helps with occasional breakouts, texture, and excess oil without over-drying my skin.

barrier.label: Sensitive skin support
barrier.value: I am looking for a calming routine for sensitive skin with fewer steps and a stronger focus on repair.

minimalist.label: Minimal routine
minimalist.value: I want a simple routine that is easy to follow and uses fewer products.

focusAreas.title: Focus areas
focusAreas.description: These priorities influence the products suggested for the draft.

chat.title: Chat
chat.description: Ask for changes, request adjustments, and refine the routine step by step.

composer.label: Tell the AI what you want to achieve
composer.placeholder: Describe your concerns, ingredients you want to use or avoid, budget, time available, and any relevant preferences...
composer.hint: This screen currently simulates the final experience. The real LLM logic will be integrated later.

messages.assistantIntro: Hi {name}, tell me what you want to improve and I will help shape a more precise routine.
messages.userGoal: I want a simple routine that helps with dehydration, sensitivity, and uneven texture.
messages.assistantFollowUp: Perfect. I will start from a base proposal and then we can keep adjusting products, steps, and notes from this conversation.
messages.pendingReply: Preview response: the assistant's next iteration will appear here once the LLM logic is connected.

draft.title: Routine draft
draft.description: This panel represents a real Routine structure: name, description, type, skin type, and steps linked to existing products.
draft.initialDescription: Initial draft generated from the chat context. Edit the fields, reorder steps, and select products that already exist on the platform.

placeholders.name: Routine name
placeholders.description: Describe what this routine is meant to improve

structure.title: Structured view
structure.summary: {count, plural, =0 {0 steps in the draft} =1 {1 step in the draft} other {{count} steps in the draft}}

draft.stepNotes: Use {productName} according to your skin tolerance and needs.
draft.empty: You have not added products to the draft yet. Use the suggestions to build the routine.

recommendedProducts.title: Suggested products
recommendedProducts.description: These recommendations use real platform products and can be added to or removed from the draft.

continuousRecommendations.title: Continuous recommendations
continuousRecommendations.description: Shortcuts to keep refining the conversation without breaking the flow.

adjustFrequency.title: Make the routine more gradual
adjustFrequency.description: Ask for a gentler version if you want to introduce actives more carefully.
adjustFrequency.prompt: Adjust the routine so the actives are introduced in a slower and more tolerable way.

swapTexture.title: Change textures
swapTexture.description: Request lighter or richer alternatives while keeping the same routine goal.
swapTexture.prompt: Suggest alternatives with lighter textures for warm and humid weather.

simplifyNight.title: Create a PM version
simplifyNight.description: Use this to request a nighttime variation that complements the main routine.
simplifyNight.prompt: Create a simpler nighttime version that complements this draft.

platformUse.title: 1. Platform use
platformUse.body: By creating an account on Skin4All, you agree to use the platform responsibly and not affect the security, availability, or experience of other users.

accountPrivacy.title: 2. Account and privacy
accountPrivacy.body: You are responsible for keeping your account credentials confidential. The information you provide will be handled according to our privacy practices and used only to improve your in-app experience.

contentRecommendations.title: 3. Content and recommendations
contentRecommendations.body: Routines and recommendations shown in the app are for informational purposes only and do not replace professional medical or dermatological advice.

changes.title: 4. Changes to these terms
changes.body: We may update these terms at any time. If important changes are made, we will notify you within the platform.
